name: hot-work-with-site-reference
notes: Submission references hot work; site reference adds permit + fire watch requirements. Should detect alignment gap and recommend follow-ups.

input.documentText: Hot Work Program. Welders perform structural welding on steel members. Use leather gloves and welding hood. Maintain a clear work area.
input.additionalGcContext: Site requires daily hot work permits, dedicated fire watch, and 35-foot clearance.
input.siteReferenceText: Site rules: Hot work requires a written permit signed by the GC superintendent prior to the task. A fire watch must be assigned and remain on site for 30 minutes after the last spark. Combustibles must be removed within 35 feet.
